description: InputTranslator has no concept of hold duration. It only knows was_pressed/is_pressed. Add per-button press timestamp tracking so actions can query 'how long has this been held'. Depends on Action redesign.

comments.text: SourceState enum is ready for a HeldSince(Instant) variant when hold-to-repeat is needed. The unified dispatch architecture makes this a straightforward addition.

title: Add duration tracking to translator for hold-based actions
